title: Mindset Learning Hub
text:
Mindset Learning Hub - SupportGoWhere
Mindset Learning Hub
Share link
Provides vocational training, job placement and job support for persons with mental health conditions.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based, Online
Free
Referral required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

Pre-vocation intervention (Employment guidance and counselling, Service linkages and coordination)

Vocational Rehabilitation (Core modules include Soft and Employability skills, Work skills, Life skills)

Traineeship (may include settings in Café / F&B, Cleaning, Retail, Administrative, Customer service and community outreach)

Job Placement

Job Support (up to 9 months post placement)

Peer Support

Who is this for?

Persons-In-Recovery and Persons-At-Risk of developing mental health related conditions, who are seeking skills training and gainful employment opportunities.

What to expect?

First contact and phone call screening of a referral will be made within 3 working days.

Subsequently, a physical appointment for intake will be set within 7 working days (subject to client’s availability).

Enrolment results will be made known to client or Next-of-Kin on the 10th working day from referral date.

How to apply?

Individuals can call the agency to make an appointment for the intake assessment, or ask the referring source (e.g. hospital) to make a referral to SAMH.

Information last updated on 17 Sep 2025
